negative_variants.description: Kcl Capacitor Ddt Current: clips negative ddt current to zero, so rising-ramp smoke tests can pass but falling-ramp checks fail.
Kcl Capacitor Ddt Current: doubles the ddt current, preserving sign and timing but failing calibrated magnitude checks.
Kcl Capacitor Ddt Current: contributes into the reversed branch direction, so timing looks plausible but signed current checks fail.
Kcl Capacitor Ddt Current: differentiates V(p) instead of V(p,n), so n=0 smoke tests can pass but dynamic-reference checks fail.
Kcl Capacitor Ddt Current: uses 0.8x capacitance, preserving waveform shape but failing calibrated current samples.
